user_goal: 在 B006/B010/B011/B012 之后实现 Regime-Adaptive Multi-Asset 策略 MVP（独立新策略路径）：新资产宇宙（Risk Core SPY/QQQ/VEA/VWO + Stabilizers IEF/TLT/GLD/DBC + Defensive SGOV）、L1 200-day SMA 趋势过滤、L2 复用 B010 inverse-vol + 8% 目标波动率、L3 regime 检测（Fast/Slow vol ratio + SPY 趋势 → NORMAL/BEAR/CRISIS）+ 危机模式敞口减半、3% tolerance bands + regime override、真实历史公开数据 snapshot（2018-2025）支撑 2020/2022 stress 验收（max drawdown < 15%）、lightweight 参数 sensitivity sweep、Master Portfolio 新增 regime_adaptive sleeve（planning_weight=0.0 保留向后兼容），全程 fixture/mock-first、no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。
generator_handoff: Generator completed B013 F001-F010 across two sessions. New package trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ with config.py (RegimeAdaptiveConfig + 9 AssetEntry universe), snapshot.py (opt-in manifest importer, 9-ticker validation, sha256 deterministic id), trend_gating.py (L1 SMA200, SGOV never gated), weighting.py (L2 inverse-vol via B010, gated capital routed to SGOV by keep_ratio), regime.py (L3 NORMAL/BEAR/CRISIS detection + crisis exposure halving), backtest.py (monthly L1→L2→L3 + 3% tolerance band + regime transition override + B011 kill-switch), reports.py (JSON/Markdown + static 60/40 baseline + 2020/2022 stress gates pass/skip/fail + research-only disclaimer), sensitivity.py (deterministic 6-knob × 3-value sweep, offline). New scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py for opt-in CSV import. Master Portfolio gained REGIME_ADAPTIVE_SLEEVE at planning_weight=0.0 via default_master_portfolio_parameters_with_regime_adaptive; Master backtest short-circuits zero-weight implemented sleeves while enforcing KNOWN_IMPLEMENTED_STRATEGY_IDS loadability check. New tests/unit/test_*regime_adaptive*.py (8 files, ~100 tests covering config, snapshot, gating, weighting, regime, backtest, reports, sensitivity, sleeve registration, and safety guards). Local checks: pytest (336), ruff, compileall, mypy. Evaluator should run F011 L1 verification, confirm BL stress gate skipped semantics under fixture, snapshot acquisition CLI manual-only, sensitivity sweep deterministic offline, and Master invariants preserved.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14: Closed B012 done wrap-up (state-machine consistency fix + environment.md python>=3.11 note). User added a research document (docs/specs/research/B011-regime-adaptive-multi-asset-spec.md) and three research material collections (arxiv 38 / github 32 / institutional 47); naming collision resolved by moving the regime-adaptive spec under docs/specs/research/. Analyzed research materials against current implementation; found strong literature support for the user's L1/L2/L3 three-shield proposal (AEGIS, regime-switching trend-following, smoothing volatility targeting, transaction-cost tolerance-band literature). Confirmed B013 direction: Option A independent new strategy module, add real historical public data snapshot 2018-2025 (user authorized public data download), include lightweight parameter sensitivity sweep (planner recommendation), add regime_adaptive sleeve to Master Portfolio at planning_weight=0.0 for backwards-compat. Wrote B013 spec and features.json (11 features: F001-F010 generator + F011 codex). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14: B013 F001-F010 completed across two sessions. New package trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/: config.py (9-asset Risk Core/Stabilizer/Defensive universe + parameter_hash + validation), snapshot.py (opt-in CSV bundle import with sha256-deterministic snapshot id, manifest emission, fail-closed on missing tickers / date coverage / manual confirmation), trend_gating.py (L1 SMA200 with SGOV never gated, insufficient history fail-closed), weighting.py (L2 inverse-vol via B010 + 8% target_volatility, gated capital routed to SGOV by keep_ratio), regime.py (L3 Fast/Slow vol ratio × SPY trend → NORMAL/BEAR/CRISIS, crisis halves non-defensive, human_review_required), backtest.py (monthly L1→L2→L3 + 3% tolerance band + regime transition override + T+1 open + B011 kill-switch), reports.py (JSON/Markdown + calculated 60/40 baseline + B006/B010 placeholders + 2020/2022 stress gates pass/skip/fail + research-only disclaimer), sensitivity.py (deterministic 6-knob × 3-value sweep, offline). scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py CLI wrapper.
